Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Iron]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 2''' — Iron strength is a level of power Kelsa needs to fight effectively.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 12''' — Iron is a stage of practitioner.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — At the Iron stage, one's eyes get better and they forge their body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — Iron is a stage of advancement following Copper.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon is waiting for Iron.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 11''' — Iron is a body type or stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 12''' — Iron is a stage of advancement related to madra/body strength.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 12''' — Iron is a stage that can be reached after walking a Path.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 14''' — Iron is a physical attribute or state that miners possess.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 14''' — To reach Iron, one must push madra out of the channels and into the flesh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — Iron is a stage of advancement lower than Jade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — Iron is a power stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — Advancing to Iron completely reforges the body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — Advancing to Iron too early can cripple a sacred artist's future.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — The transformation to Iron is a possibility for Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 17''' — Iron is a stage of advancement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 17''' — Iron is a stage of advancement for Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — Iron is a rank or stage held by Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon is an Iron.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — An Iron child should have no more pride than a mouse.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 2''' — Kral was killed by a boy who is an Iron.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — An Iron is a stage of progression that still needs sleep and food.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — Iron is a quality of pure madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — The character possesses iron.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — Irons are a group that stayed behind during the fight.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Iron is a rank or stage held by some guards of the Fallen Leaf School.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — The Iron is a guard that uses spears and foxfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — Iron is a level of madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — The Heaven's Glory group includes a dozen Irons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Iron is a rank or classification of person in the Wei clan context.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
